sql.monthly_sipo_outflow: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', t.date)::date AS trans_month, SUM(t.amount) AS household_payment_outflow FROM trans t WHERE t.k_symbol = 'SIPO' AND t.date >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND t.date < DATE '1999-01-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
sql.accounts_above_2x_1996_baseline: WITH monthly AS (SELECT t.account_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', t.date)::date AS trans_month, SUM(t.amount) AS monthly_sipo_amount FROM trans t WHERE t.k_symbol = 'SIPO' GROUP BY 1, 2), baseline AS (SELECT account_id, AVG(monthly_sipo_amount) AS avg_1996_monthly_sipo FROM monthly WHERE trans_month >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND trans_month < DATE '1997-01-01' GROUP BY account_id), later AS (SELECT account_id, trans_month, monthly_sipo_amount FROM monthly WHERE trans_month >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND trans_month < DATE '1999-01-01') SELECT later.account_id, later.trans_month, later.monthly_sipo_amount, baseline.avg_1996_monthly_sipo, later.monthly_sipo_amount / NULLIF(baseline.avg_1996_monthly_sipo, 0) AS ratio_to_1996_baseline FROM later JOIN baseline ON baseline.account_id = later.account_id WHERE later.monthly_sipo_amount > 2 * baseline.avg_1996_monthly_sipo ORDER BY ratio_to_1996_baseline DESC;
sql.regional_sipo_volume: SELECT d."A3" AS region, SUM(t.amount) AS household_payment_volume FROM trans t JOIN account a ON a.account_id = t.account_id JOIN district d ON d.district_id = a.district_id WHERE t.k_symbol = 'SIPO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY household_payment_volume DESC;

chart_spec.layout_intent: trend, exception table, and regional volume view
